title: Autonomous Agents — Task Board Polling
description: An autonomous agent runs in an idle loop, periodically scanning a task board for new work. When it finds an unclaimed task, it auto-claims it, executes the work, and reports completion. No human triggers needed.

steps.content:
Autonomous agent started. Mode: idle-polling. Scan interval: 30s.
Connected to task board: https://tasks.internal/api
steps.annotation: The agent starts in autonomous mode. Unlike interactive agents, it doesn't wait for user messages — it actively scans for work on a shared task board.

steps.content:
Scanning task board... (cycle #47)
Found 0 unclaimed tasks. Returning to idle.
steps.annotation: IDLE CYCLE: The agent polls the task board and finds nothing to do. It returns to idle and will scan again after the interval. This is the 'heartbeat' of an autonomous agent.

steps.content:
Scanning task board... (cycle #48)
Found 1 unclaimed task:
  TASK-2847: "Add input validation to BookController POST endpoint"
  Priority: HIGH | Labels: [bug-fix, backend]
  Description: "The POST /api/books endpoint accepts empty titles. Add @Valid annotation and constraints."
steps.annotation: A new task appears on the board. The agent evaluates whether it can handle this task based on its capabilities and the task's requirements.
The agent auto-claims the task. This prevents other agents from picking it up simultaneously. The claim is atomic to avoid race conditions.

steps.content:
TASK-2847 claimed by auto-agent-03. Status: IN_PROGRESS.
Lock acquired. Timeout: 600s.
steps.annotation: Task claimed with a timeout lock. If the agent crashes or takes too long, the lock expires and the task returns to the board.
The agent reads the relevant file to understand the current state before making changes.
The endpoint lacks @Valid annotation and the Book entity likely lacks constraint annotations.

steps.content:
old_string: '    public Book createBook(@RequestBody Book book) {'
new_string: '    public Book createBook(@Valid @RequestBody Book book) {'
steps.annotation: Adding @Valid to trigger JSR-303 bean validation on the request body.
Controller updated. The agent also needs to add validation annotations to the Book entity.

steps.content: { "taskId": "TASK-2847", "action": "complete", "summary": "Added @Valid to POST /api/books. Added @NotBlank to Book.title and @Positive to Book.price. Tests added and passing." }
steps.annotation: The agent marks the task as complete on the board with a summary. The task is released and other agents or humans can review it.

steps.content:
TASK-2847 completed by auto-agent-03.
Status: DONE. Lock released.
Returning to idle-polling mode.
steps.annotation: Task complete. The autonomous agent returns to its idle loop, scanning for the next task. It will continue this cycle indefinitely until stopped.
